'''rajapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctophiliac|nyctophiliac]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-j-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctophiliac|nyctophiliac]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| rajapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ræjæpæth || ræjæpæj || ræjæpæsh || ræjæpæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || rajajapath || rajajapaj || rajajapash || rajajapa
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || rajapath || rajapaj || rajapash || rajapa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || rajafpafth || rajafpafj || rajafpafsh || rajafpaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || rajapatha || rajapaja || rajapasha || rajapaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || rajapath || rajapaj || rajapash || rajapa
|-
| [[Possessive]] || rajapathal || rajapajal || rajapashal || rajapakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || rajapaathatha || rajapaajaja || rajapaashasha || rajapaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || rajapathan || rajapajan || rajapashan || rajapakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || rajapathaoro || rajapajaoro || rajapashaoro || rajapakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
